race.description: STRADBROKE SEASON ON SALE NOW MAIDEN PLATE
race.comment: BON VADER (3) returned in good order with a solid second at Doomben and will have taken some benefit from that hit-out. Has been well in the betting in all four starts to date and where there's smoke there's fire. Rates the testing material. The well-related SWING STATE (5) (half to G2 winner In Good Order) has been thereabouts in both runs this campaign and maps ideally for this from gate four. Can make his presence felt. THE AVIATOR (6) has placed three of four this time in work including a placing over this track and trip two back. Shapes as a leading contender. SHAQUE D'AMOUR (2) has had a few chances but gets some weight relief with the 3kg claim and may earn some minor money again. UNCOMMON DAISY (11) also hails from a handy family (half to G1 winner Uncommon James) and looks one for the exotics players.
